title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A tutorial on Infrastructure as Code fundamentals using AWS CDK in Python. Demonstrates building a serverless REST API by first manually clicking through the AWS console, then rebuilding it declaratively with CDK, covering DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway. Contrasts CDK with alternative IaC tools like CloudFormation and Terraform.
